name: Chocolate Midnight Madness
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl with mixer on medium speed, beat together the cream cheese and real mayonnaise until smooth. Gradually beat in the sugar.
2. Beat in the eggs one at a time, then stir in the melted chocolate and vanilla until smooth.
3. Pour the mixture into the pie crust and place it on a cookie sheet. Bake at 350°F for 30 to 35 minutes or until set. Chill for 4 hours.
